rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §54.051 governs transfer of juvenile determinate sentence probation to district court. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 54.051. TRANSFER OF DETERMINATE SENTENCE PROBATION TO APPROPRIATE DISTRICT COURT.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
